message: Added tests for 1 file (mestres.ts). interpretation-engine.ts already has comprehensive coverage via interpretation-engine.test.ts (interpretarVida, interpretarVidaArea, MASTER_NUMBERS, VIDA_CONTENT — 14 tests). New mestres.test.ts adds 5 tests covering MESTRES_CONTENT structure, canonical keys, levels, and edge cases. All 5/5 pass; commit 642349cf.
